Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.predicate

Interface INormalizedFormula

All Known Implementing Classes:
NormalizedFormula
public interface INormalizedFormula
INormalizedFormula is the interface for a normalized formula.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IOrigin
    getOrigin()
    Returns the origin of this normalized formula (used for tracing).
    SignedFormula<?>
    getSignature()
    Returns the signature of this formula.
    List<TermSignature>
    getTerms()
    Returns the list of terms appearing in this formula.

      Returns the origin of this normalized formula (used for tracing).
      Returns:
